subcodes.first_line: Verily, the servant in attendance hath come to brew from the leaves of China that his Ancient Lord might drink thereof. He hath prepared it and brought it before Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الخادم اتی لیطبخ من ورق الصین و یشرب منه مولیه القدیم طبخ و احضره لدی
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @praise and encouragement, @scarcity of receptive souls, @eulogies; reminiscences
